title: Magia Naturalis
description: A legacy addon for Thaumcraft 4 that adds misc stuff.
body:
# Magia Naturalis (Legacy Edition)

**Requires Thaumcraft 4**

This is a legacy re-release of my ~11 year old (2014-2015) addon mod for Thaumcraft 4 which, I published under my old username (TrinaryBrain) on the minecraftforum ([wayback machine link](https://web.archive.org/web/20170720130055/http://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding/minecraft-mods/wip-mods/2328507-wip-thaumcraft-4-2-addon-magia-naturalis-v0-1-5b)).

As i'm publishing this mod for prosperity sake and to preserve it for future generations there will be no new feature updates. But i will fix bugs and improve features if you open issues on github.

## Items
- Focus of Construction: something akin to a builder wand
- Focus of the Revenant: summons Baby Zombies that fight for you
- Dark Crystal Goggles
- Research Log
- Spectacles
- Focus Enderpouch
- Thaumium Sickle
- Void Sickle
- Sickle of Abundance
- Thaumium Keys for arcane doors and chests
- Alchemy Stones
- Biome Report

## Blocks
- Geo-Pylon for changeing Biomes
- Transcribing Table for automating Deconstruction Tables
- Arcane Chests (Warded, Greatwood & Silverwood)
- Entity in a Jar
- more arcane wood variants (silverwood planks, etc.)
- a simple banner with the logo

## Mobs
- "evil" Traveling Trunks that will support you in combat (with 4 visual variants)
